recommendations.title: All Together
recommendations.overview: Five old friends decide to move in together as an alternative to living in a retirement home. Joining them is an ethnology student whose thesis is on the aging population.

recommendations.title: Bodied
recommendations.overview: A progressive graduate student finds success and sparks outrage when his interest in battle rap as a thesis subject becomes a competitive obsession.

recommendations.title: Black Butler
recommendations.genres: Horror, Fantasy, Action, Adventure, Mystery, Crime, Drama
recommendations.overview: Set in the year 2020, following her supposed death, a young woman returns as the son of her noble family to precede the family's prestigious company, with a demon at her side to avenge her parent's murder.

recommendations.title: Thesis
recommendations.overview: While working on a thesis about audiovisual violence, film student Ángela finds a snuff video where a girl is tortured until death. Soon she discovers that she was a former student in her university, and that the authors of the video are not very far

recommendations.title: Vesper
recommendations.overview: After the collapse of Earth's ecosystem, Vesper, a 13-year-old girl struggling to survive with her paralyzed Father, meets a mysterious Woman with a secret that forces Vesper to use her wits, strength and bio-hacking abilities to fight for the possib

recommendations.title: Secret
recommendations.overview: Ye Xiang Lun, a talented piano player is a new student at the prestigious Tamkang School. On his first day, he meets Lu Xiao Yu, a pretty girl playing a mysterious piece of music.

recommendations.title: Outer Space
recommendations.overview: A young woman move towards a house that holds a potentially dangerous spirit that has been tormenting her. The woman tries to fight against the film itself as it starts to cause the world to collapse.

recommendations.title: Quién te cantará
recommendations.overview: Lila, a famous retired singer, loses her memory after suffering an accident, just as she planned her return to the stage.

recommendations.title: The Red Virgin
recommendations.overview: Hildegart is conceived and educated by her mother Aurora to be the woman of the future, to become one of the most brilliant minds of Spain in the 1930s and one of the European references on female sexuality.

recommendations.title: Christmas Under Wraps
